reviews.comment:
Buena atención . Sanitarios limpios. Proveeduría adecuada. La carga de combustible es una molestia para el turista porque está en zona de alta demanda y posee almacenaje modesto

(Translated by Google)
Good service. Clean restrooms. Adequate supplies. Fueling up is a nuisance for tourists because it's in a high-demand area and has limited storage.
